title: bassia pauciflora
intro: Bassia pauciflora, also known as the Chinese spring onion or Chinese chives, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Bassia pauciflora include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bassia pauciflora can be found in the form of tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
